title: AAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Scientific Helper Posts
description: Assam Agriculture University (AAU) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Scientific Helper Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for M.Sc. can grab this chance and apply for the AAU Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
